problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: The key to What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? is Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing — specifically Fear memory reconsolidation — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
